text:
I am trying to install FreeBSD 2.2.7 
directly from the Bootable CDROM.
I also faced the same problem. I have a 
P2-300 Meg/64 MB
I have SCSI CDROM (NEC 6XI) + 4GB SCSI 
IBM Drive. The Controller is 2940UW.
Is there any solution for this problem 
?

Baskaran
